_README: Template for app-agent/config-remote.json — the :3500 remote-server proxy (LAN/mobile dashboard relay).
Copy this file to config-remote.json (same dir) and fill each PC's `token`.
`token` = that PC's machine key = the `token` field in its <userData>/jamat/remote-control.json
(reveal it in the app: Remote connections panel). The proxy injects it as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'
when relaying /api/* to that PC's agent (:3501); without it the agent gate returns 401.
Also required on each PC: remote control must be ENABLED (enabled:true) for the agent gate to pass.
config-remote.json is gitignored on purpose (machine keys are RCE credentials) — never commit the real one.
